'''nashata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ukha|ukha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ukha|ukha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nashata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næshætæth|næshætæth]] || [[word:næshætæj|næshætæj]] || [[word:næshætæsh|næshætæsh]] || [[word:næshætæ|næshætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nashashatath|nashashatath]] || [[word:nashashataj|nashashataj]] || [[word:nashashatash|nashashatash]] || [[word:nashashata|nashashata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nashatath|nashatath]] || [[word:nashataj|nashataj]] || [[word:nashatash|nashatash]] || [[word:nashata|nashata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nashaftath|nashaftath]] || [[word:nashaftaj|nashaftaj]] || [[word:nashaftash|nashaftash]] || [[word:nashaftaf|nashaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nashatatha|nashatatha]] || [[word:nashataja|nashataja]] || [[word:nashatasha|nashatasha]] || [[word:nashataka|nashataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nashatath|nashatath]] || [[word:nashataj|nashataj]] || [[word:nashatash|nashatash]] || [[word:nashata|nashata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nashatathal|nashatathal]] || [[word:nashatajal|nashatajal]] || [[word:nashatashal|nashatashal]] || [[word:nashatakal|nashatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nashatathatha|nashatathatha]] || [[word:nashatajaja|nashatajaja]] || [[word:nashatashasha|nashatashasha]] || [[word:nashataka|nashataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nashatathan|nashatathan]] || [[word:nashatajan|nashatajan]] || [[word:nashatashan|nashatashan]] || [[word:nashatakan|nashatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nashatathaoro|nashatathaoro]] || [[word:nashatajaoro|nashatajaoro]] || [[word:nashatashaoro|nashatashaoro]] || [[word:nashatakaoro|nashatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
